LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT, MORGAN WALTON'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE CLAIMANT HAS SATISFIED HER BURDEN TO SHOW SHE IS UNABLE TO PAY MORE THAN $100.00 PER PAY PERIOD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. MS. WALTON WILL HAVE $100.00 WITHHELD FROM HER EARNINGS EACH PAY PERIOD. LEVYING OFFICER SHALL RELEASE FUNDS BEING WITHHELD BACK TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. THE COURT WILL PREPARE THE WRITTEN ORDER. calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Morgan Walton, in pro per, Tel. 628.444.0130, for defendant Morgan Walton;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant, Morgan Walton's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted. The claimant has satisfied her burden to show she is unable to pay more than $100.00 per pay period to the judgment creditor. Ms. Walton will have $100.00 withheld from her earnings each pay period. Levying officer shall release funds being withheld back to the judgment debtor. The Court will prepare the written order. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
